design_philosophy: Premium smart-agriculture aesthetic: modern SaaS dashboard quality, calm earthy neutrals, elegant green/teal accents, subtle agricultural tone, clean professional cards, high readability, minimal clutter.

layout.navigation: Left sidebar (w-64 on desktop) + Top header (h-16). Mobile-friendly drawer for small screens.
layout.spacing_system: Tailwind scale. Generous padding (p-8, p-12) for empty states/marketing; compact padding (p-4, p-6) for dense dashboard cards.
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. F-Pattern for F-KPIs. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).

surfaces_and_components.cards: Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius, rounded-lg), flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no massive shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary color with explicit hover states. Focus states must use ring-2.
surfaces_and_components.charts: Recharts. Use semantic colors (green/healthy, amber/warning, red/critical). Avoid complex charts; use Line Charts for trends, Bar for comparisons.
surfaces_and_components.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button').

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone weight) for high-end SaaS aesthetic.

image_urls.description: Drone shot of a corn harvester in a lush green field
Farmer walking on field with tablet
Green block with white O/leaf shape

instructions_to_main_agent: Interface language MUST be strictly French.
Implement full-stack React frontend (.js files) + FastAPI backend + MongoDB.
Implement logic-based predictions on sensor data (no LLMs).
Implement Left sidebar + Top header layout.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
Use custom Shadcn UI components. Ensure no generic Bootstrap look. Maintain a calm, professional B2B agritech vibe.
Follow 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. F-pattern for reading KPIs.
Implement Dark mode seamlessly. Ensure dark mode uses deep earthy green/black (#0D110F), not just pure gray.
